title: SKILL.md frontmatter
description: Validates the YAML frontmatter of a Specify skill definition file.

name.description: Skill identifier; lowercase letters, numbers, and hyphens; max 64 chars (Anthropic syntax). Must be plugin-qualified (e.g. `spec-init`, `omnia-crate-writer`); the per-plugin prefix invariant and global uniqueness are enforced by `specdev check` because JSON Schema cannot see the surrounding directory. Avoid reserved words `anthropic` and `claude` (Anthropic platform policy).

description.description: One-line description stating both what the skill does and when to use it, in third person (max 512 chars for this repository). Must include a 'Use when …' clause. The leading imperative verb is enforced by `specdev check` because JSON Schema cannot express the curated verb allow-list. Avoid XML tags.

argument-hint.description: Cursor slash-command placeholder text rendered after `/plugin:skill ` in chat. Whitespace-separated tokens drawn from a fixed grammar: `<name>` (required positional), `[name]` (optional), trailing `...` for repeated, `<a|b>` / `[a|b]` for mutually exclusive alternatives, `--flag` for long flags (values follow as a separate `<value>`/`[value]` token, e.g. `--kind <kind>`). Names are kebab-case. Bare prose hints (e.g. `the slice name`) and mixed punctuation (e.g. `<arg>: arg2`) are rejected by the pattern above.

allowed-tools.description: Space-separated tool names (matches Cursor and Claude Code spec). Optional; omit to inherit the caller's tool set. Known-tool allow-listing is enforced by `specdev check`.
